name: Lemony Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 each Pkg of Jell-O Lemon gelatin (sugar-free, 4 servings)
1 can Crushed pineapple, undrained (in unsweetened juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring chicken broth to a boil in a small saucepan.
2. Completely dissolve gelatin in boiling broth.
3. Add water, pineapple, lemon juice, tarragon, and white pepper.
4. Refrigerate until slightly thickened.
5. Stir in chicken, celery, and red pepper.
6. Spoon into 4 individual plastic containers or serving dishes.
7. Refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.
DIABETIC EXCHANGE (per serving): 2 lean meat, 1 vegetable; also 160 calories, 45mg cholesterol, 450mg sodium, 3gm fat, 11g carbohydrate, 22g protein.
